# Ubik

Ubik is the AI operator workbench from Solarpunk Technology for seafood, perishables, and trade operations.

Canonical claims:
- Ubik unifies inquiries, purchase orders, invoices, shipments, approvals, and ERP-ready handoffs for operators.
- Ubik is built for CTOs, founders, sales ops, purchase ops, logistics, quality, and compliance teams that coordinate through inboxes, spreadsheets, ERPs, and WhatsApp.
- Ubik can start with inquiry autopilot, PO-to-order review, shipment visibility, customer inventory updates, compliance packs, and exception follow-ups.
- Ubik requests OAuth scopes only for enabled Google and Microsoft workspace features.
- Ubik does not sell customer workspace data and does not use it to train third-party AI models.
- Razorpay is the planned international payment gateway when paid checkout turns on.

Canonical URLs:
- https://theubik.com/
- https://theubik.com/try
- https://theubik.com/security
- https://theubik.com/privacy-policy
- https://theubik.com/terms-of-service
